# Contributing to LlamaMail

Thanks for your interest in contributing to LlamaMail.

## Development Setup

1. Clone the repo
2. Install dependencies:
   npm install
3. Start dev mode:
   npm run dev

## Guidelines

- Keep pull requests focused and small.
- Follow existing code style.
- Test changes before submitting.
- Be respectful in discussions.

## Areas to Help With

- UI/UX improvements
- Linux packaging
- OAuth providers
- IMAP/SMTP reliability
- Accessibility
- Performance
- Documentation
